---
name: Source request
about: Propose a new research source or collector
title: "[Source]: "
labels: source
assignees: ""
---

## Source

Name and URL/API endpoint.

## Source type

- [ ] RSS/news
- [ ] Reddit/social
- [ ] Exchange
- [ ] Market data
- [ ] Filing/regulatory
- [ ] Research/papers
- [ ] Other

## Expected value

What kinds of research records could this source produce?

## Access requirements

Does it need an API key, login, paid plan, or special terms?

## Risks

Any rate limits, legal/API concerns, noisy content, or privacy concerns?
